questions.q: Who was the Greek historian who wrote 'Indica'?
questions.explanation: Megasthenes was a Greek historian who wrote 'Indica' which is one of the earliest accounts of India.

questions.q: Which of the following was NOT a major factor that made Indian and Chinese empires attractive to the European traders?
questions.explanation: European traders were not looking for new agricultural techniques, they wanted to establish trade relations and explore resources.

questions.q: Who was the famous Chinese traveller who visited India in the 7th century?
questions.explanation: Xuanzang was a famous Chinese traveller who visited India in the 7th century and wrote about the Buddhist monasteries and education systems of India.

questions.q: What was the main reason for the establishment of the Portuguese trade route to India?
opts: (A) To establish a new trade route with China
(C) To find a new source of spices and other valuable goods
(D) To establish a new base for pirate attacks
questions.explanation: The main reason for the establishment of the Portuguese trade route to India was to find a new source of spices and other valuable goods.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major factor that led to the decline of the Mughal Empire?
questions.explanation: The decline of the Mughal Empire was a result of a combination of factors including succession crisis, external threats from European powers, economic decline, and corruption.

questions.q: Who was the famous European traveller who wrote about the wonders of India and the Indian Ocean trade?
questions.explanation: Niccolao Manucci was a famous European traveller who wrote about the wonders of India and the Indian Ocean trade.

questions.q: Which of the following was NOT a major product of the Indian Ocean trade?
questions.explanation: Coal and iron were not major products of the Indian Ocean trade, while spices, textiles, and precious stones were major products.

questions.q: Who was the famous Chinese emperor who sent a series of diplomatic missions to India?
questions.explanation: Taizong was a famous Chinese emperor who sent a series of diplomatic missions to India.

questions.q: What was the significance of the voyage of Vasco da Gama to India?
opts: (A) It marked the beginning of European colonization of India
(B) It led to the decline of the Mughal Empire
(C) It established a new trade route to India
(D) It led to the spread of Christianity in India
questions.explanation: The voyage of Vasco da Gama to India marked the beginning of European trade with India and established a new trade route.

questions.q: Who was the famous Indian traveller who wrote about the history of India and the Indian Ocean trade?
questions.explanation: Al-Biruni was a famous Indian traveller who wrote about the history of India and the Indian Ocean trade.

questions.q: What was the major impact of the Indian Ocean trade on the economies of Indian and Chinese empires?
opts: (A) It led to economic growth and prosperity
(B) It led to economic decline and poverty
(C) It had no impact on the economies
(D) It led to a redistribution of wealth
questions.explanation: The Indian Ocean trade had a major impact on the economies of Indian and Chinese empires, leading to economic growth and prosperity.

questions.q: Who was the famous Mughal emperor who established trade relations with European powers?
questions.explanation: Akbar was a famous Mughal emperor who established trade relations with European powers.

questions.q: What was the significance of the voyage of Ibn Battuta to India?
opts: (A) It marked the beginning of African trade with India
(B) It led to the decline of the Mughal Empire
(C) It established a new trade route to India
(D) It led to the spread of Islam in India
questions.explanation: The voyage of Ibn Battuta to India established a new trade route and marked the beginning of African trade with India.

questions.q: Who was the famous European explorer who wrote about the wonders of India and the Indian Ocean trade?
questions.explanation: François Pyrard was a famous European explorer who wrote about the wonders of India and the Indian Ocean trade.

questions.q: What was the major impact of the Indian Ocean trade on the social and cultural life of Indian and Chinese empires?
opts: (A) It led to a mixing of cultures and ideas
(B) It led to a decline in cultural and social life
(C) It had no impact on social and cultural life
(D) It led to a redistribution of power
questions.explanation: The Indian Ocean trade had a major impact on the social and cultural life of Indian and Chinese empires, leading to a mixing of cultures and ideas.

questions.q: Who was the famous Chinese scholar who wrote about the history of India and the Indian Ocean trade?
questions.explanation: Zheng He was a famous Chinese scholar who wrote about the history of India and the Indian Ocean trade.

questions.q: What was the significance of the voyage of Vasco da Gama to India for the European powers?
opts: (A) It marked the beginning of European colonization of India
(B) It led to the decline of the Mughal Empire
(C) It established a new trade route to India and marked the beginning of European dominance in the Indian Ocean trade
(D) It led to the spread of Christianity in India
questions.explanation: The voyage of Vasco da Gama to India established a new trade route and marked the beginning of European dominance in the Indian Ocean trade.

questions.q: Who was the famous Indian emperor who established diplomatic relations with Chinese empires?
questions.explanation: Ashoka was a famous Indian emperor who established diplomatic relations with Chinese empires.

questions.q: What was the major impact of the Indian Ocean trade on the politics of Indian and Chinese empires?
opts: (A) It led to a redistribution of power and influence
(B) It led to a decline in power and influence
(C) It had no impact on politics
(D) It led to a concentration of power and influence
questions.explanation: The Indian Ocean trade had a major impact on the politics of Indian and Chinese empires, leading to a redistribution of power and influence.

questions.q: Who was the famous European scholar who wrote about the history of India and the Indian Ocean trade?
questions.explanation: François Pyrard was a famous European scholar who wrote about the history of India and the Indian Ocean trade.
